clause_ref: ISO 128-20:1996 — Technical drawings — General principles of presentation — Part 20: Basic conventions for lines
_note: Line widths form a geometric progression with ratio 1:√2 ≈ 1:1.414. Each width applies to a specific class of line (continuous, dashed, etc.). The minimum width for legibility on most reproductions is 0.18 mm.

typical_use.0.70: Very heavy outlines, primary structural members

engine_lookup._purpose: Flat key/value form for runtime engine consumption
